arts.ttl: Liverpool suffer injury blow ahead of Manchester United Premier League clash at Anfield
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Joe Gomez was substituted in the first half of Sunday's Premier League clash against West Ham

arts.ttl: Spurs rocked by two more blows ahead of Newcastle United visit
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's squad is already severely stretched, but he saw defender Destiny Udogie limp out of Sunday's 2-2 draw with Wolverhampton Wanderers with a hamstring problem, while Rodrigo Bentancur will be suspended after picking up five yellow cards. Postecoglou refused to be too hard on his players, who will get two days off with Spurs set to have a rare clear midweek ahead of Saturday's visit of Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Manchester United at risk of equalling unwanted 62-year record vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Man United will be keen to arrest a run of three successive defeats in all competitions when they face Newcastle United on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Newcastle could be without seven players vs Man United as Ruben Amorim handed huge boost
arts.sum: Manchester United look to bounce back against Newcastle on Monday with the Magpies potentially being without seven players at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: The big-money summer signing who already needs to go, the great survivor at the back and the Premier League hotshot he should make a move for… CHRIS SUTTON reveals how radical Ruben Amorim can ditch the deadwood and overhaul Man United
arts.sum: CHRIS SUTTON: I've not been surprised by anything when it comes to United this season. I've been predicting them to lose most weeks now and I think they've got no choice but to stick with Amorim.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's Newcastle United secret weapon can add to Manchester United humiliation
arts.sum: For the Red Devils, it therefore isn't a good time to welcome Newcastle United to Old Trafford given Eddie Howe's side have started to find their feet with well-worked routines from dead ball situations. Manchester United have a conceded a club-record 18 times from free kicks and corners in 2024 with Amorim hoping that tally isn't added to before 2025 rolls around.

arts.ttl: Full Manchester United squad available to Ruben Amorim vs Newcastle as two big decisions to be made
arts.sum: The latest Man United news as the Reds host Newcastle on Monday night with Ruben Amorim seeking a response from his struggling team

arts.ttl: 'I single-handedly denied Man Utd the title – I’ll never get bored of talking about it'
arts.sum: Ludek Miklosko was in inspired form for West Ham on the final day of the 1994/95 Premier League season, as the Hammers held Man Utd to a 1-1 draw to deny the Red Devils a third consecutive title

arts.ttl: Journalist claims Newcastle may have to “lose a big star” in 2025
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon, Bruno Guimaraes, and Alexander Isak have been linked with a move away from Newcastle United in recent months. All three players have been exceptional for Newcastle since joining the club and naturally, top clubs are keen on securing their signatures. It will be interesting to see if Newcastle are forced to consider selling […] The post Journalist claims Newcastle may have to “lose a big star” in 2025 appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Wait and see – Ruben Amorim leaves door open for Harry Maguire to take armband
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes is suspended against Newcastle.
